sessionSummary: OpenCode-cli-compact audit for tree-sitter and implementation-summary coverage across api cli mcp entry points.

keyDecisions.decision: Keep opencode cli compact aliases canonical
keyDecisions.rationale: tree sitter and implementation summary variants should collapse to the canonical hyphenated anchors.

filesModified.description: Canonicalize opencode cli compact and tree sitter aliases while preserving api cli mcp anchors.
